name: unirate-currency
title: UniRate Currency
description: Convert currencies and look up exchange rates for any date back to 1999, powered by UniRateAPI.
author: rob_brown96cc

commands.name: convert
commands.title: Convert Currency
commands.subtitle: UniRate
commands.description: Convert between currencies on today's rate or any historical date.

commands.name: rates
commands.title: Latest Rates
commands.subtitle: UniRate
commands.description: Browse latest exchange rates for a chosen base currency.

preferences.name: api_key
preferences.title: UniRate API Key
preferences.description: Free API key from https://unirateapi.com/dashboard. The free tier covers latest-rate endpoints; historical and commodities require a Pro key.

preferences.name: default_base
preferences.title: Default Base Currency
preferences.description: Three-letter ISO code (e.g. USD, EUR, GBP). Used as the initial "From" currency.

preferences.name: decimals
preferences.title: Decimals
preferences.description: Number of decimal places to display in converted amounts.
